Jeanette starts juggling 3 objects. Each week she adds 2 more.  
She practices for 5 weeks total. The pattern continues weekly.  
* * *  
She increases objects weekly. The sequence follows a rule.  
Week one has 3 objects. Week two has 5 objects.  
* * *  
Week three has 7 objects. Week four has 9 objects.  
Week five has 11 objects. Total is 35 objects.
